basic_details.job_title: TISS Technical Assistants Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Tata Institute of Social Sciences (TISS) has published the Technical Assistant (Research) Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 01 Technical Assistant (Research) position. Candidates holding a Postgraduate degree in Economics, Development Studies, Social Work, Public Policy, Statistics, or an equivalent discipline with experience in quantitative/qualitative research, data analysis, report writing, and tools such as KOBO, Excel, and SPSS are eligible to apply via email. The application process will remain open until 01 August 2026, and candidates can easily access the official n

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.
age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Post-graduate in Economics, Development Studies, Social Work, Public Policy, Statistics, or equivalent field/discipline, Strong background in quantitative/qualitative/mixed methods research and in using software/tools for data analysis and data visualisation, Experience in working on large-scale research projects preferred, Proven experience in writing research documents and reports, Quantitative Analysis skills and experience for social science research with good understanding of KOBO tools, Excel, and SPSS
qualification.details: Post-graduate in Economics, Development Studies, Social Work, Public Policy, Statistics, or equivalent field/discipline. Strong background in quantitative/qualitative/mixed methods research and in using software/tools for data analysis and data visualisation. Experience in working on large-scale research projects preferred. Proven experience in writing research documents and reports. Quantitative Analysis skills and experience for social science research with good understanding of KOBO tools, Excel, and SPSS and good hold on statistical Analysis.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for TISS Technical Assistants (Research) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 01-08-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: TISS Technical Assistants Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the TISS Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download TISS Technical Assistants (Research) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: TISS Technical Assistants Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Post-graduate in Economics, Development Studies, Social Work, Public Policy, Statistics, or equivalent field/discipline. Strong background in quantitative/qualitative/mixed methods research and in using software/tools for data analysis and data visualisation. Experience in working on large-scale research projects preferred. Proven experience in writing research documents and reports. Quantitative Analysis skills and experience for social science research with good understanding of KOBO tools, Excel, and SPSS and good hold on statistical Analysis.

content_sections.heading: TISS Technical Assistants Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

content_sections.heading: TISS Technical Assistants Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for TISS Technical Assistants (Research) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 01-08-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: TISS Technical Assistants Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TISS Technical Assistants (Research) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 01 August 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Technical Assistants (Research) post?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Technical Assistants (Research) position will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 50,000.

faq.question: Q3. What are the essential qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Post-graduate degree in Economics, Development Studies, Social Work, Public Policy, Statistics, or a related field, with strong research and data analysis skills.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for this TISS recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to prepare your bio-data, attach necessary documents, and send it to the official email address specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the post of Technical Assistants (Research) in this recruitment notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Technical Assistants (Research) role?
faq.answer: The selection process for this position will primarily involve a Personal Interaction with the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q8. Does TISS offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Please refer to the official notification for details regarding age relaxation for reserved categories, as this information is not explicitly provided here.

faq.question: Q9. What kind of experience is preferred for this role?
faq.answer: Experience in working on large-scale research projects and proven experience in writing research documents and reports are preferred for this position.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The direct download link for the official notification PDF is available in the 'Important Links' section of this article for your convenience.
